# Hi there 

I’m Madiha Malikzada, a passionate software developer and data enthusiast from Afghanistan. I’m currently pursuing my bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and studying Data Science at MIT Emerging Talent.

## Expertise
I am a software developer, Writer, and Educator with over two years of experience creating interactive, user-friendly web interfaces. I have worked on freelance projects and volunteered as a math teacher for grades seven through nine with the Mosaic Foundation. My most recent project involved developing an e-commerce website utilizing JavaScript, SQL, and React.


### Teck Stack
